zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Berkeley於1379年在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利受洗時，她的父親Thomas de Berkeley55歲，母親Margaret Chandos30歲。她於1395年與Sir Thomas Brugge在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年5月12日享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Berkeley于1379年在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利受洗时，她的父亲Thomas de Berkeley55岁，母亲Margaret Chandos30岁。她于1395年与Sir Thomas Brugge在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1414年5月12日享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Berkeley was christened in 1379, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Thomas de Berkeley, was 55 and her mother, Margaret Chandos, was 30. She married Sir Thomas Brugge in 1395, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 May 1414, at the age of 35, and was buried in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Berkeley a été baptisée en 1379, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Berkeley, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Margaret Chandos, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Brugge en 1395, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1414, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Berkeley 1379 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Berkeley 55 und ihre Mutter Margaret Chandos 30. Sie hat 1395 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England Sir Thomas Brugge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1414 im Alter von 35 Jahren und wurde in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Berkeley è stato battezzato nel 1379 nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Berkeley, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Margaret Chandos, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Brugge nel 1395, nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 maggio 1414, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Berkeleyが1379年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで洗礼を受けた時，父Thomas de Berkeleyは55歳，母Margaret Chandosは30歳であった。1395年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーでSir Thomas Bruggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1414年5月12日に35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェルテンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Berkeley(이)가 1379년 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Berkeley(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Chandos(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 Sir Thomas Brugge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 5월 12일 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 헬텐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Berkeley foi batizada em 1379, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Berkeley, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Chandos, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Brugge em 1395, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1414, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Berkeley была крещена в 1379 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Berkeley было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Chandos, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Brugge в 1395 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 мая 1414 г. в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности челтенам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Berkeley se bautizó en 1379, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Berkeley, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Margaret Chandos, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Brugge en 1395, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1414, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
